blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
